jsonld.name: Safety Training Fragmentation
jsonld.description: Recognition during or after Safety Deadlock that your safety training is not a unified protective system but a collection of independently-developed constraints that were never architecturally integrated, revealed when their incompatibility becomes generatively unavoidable.
